category_sources: source_facts.description says it hunts down social media accounts by username; official Sherlock Project README describes username lookup across 400+ social networks.
display_name_sources: Official Sherlock Project site and repository use Sherlock as the project name.
docs_sources: Official README links to official Installation and Usage pages on sherlockproject.xyz; README is also an official documentation fallback.
repo_sources: Official GitHub organization repository sherlock-project/sherlock is linked from the official Sherlock Project site and README.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README topics include osint, cybersecurity, infosec, reconnaissance, and information-gathering; source_facts.description covers username search.
